title: Shape Shifter Curse Sinytra
description: This modpack is the smallest out-of-the-box modpack for the Shape Shifter Curse mod, compatible with the Sinytra Connector!
body:
# Shape Shifter Curse Sinytra Connector Compatible Modpack
### Introduction

This modpack is the smallest out-of-the-box modpack for the [Shape Shifter Curse mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/shape-shifter-curse) to work with the [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) mod. It allows you to play with this mod on Forge.

It only contains the dependent mods required by the Shape Shifter Curse mod, as well as a few quality-of-life mods. After installation, you can freely add any additional mods you prefer.

The version number of this modpack matches the version number of the Shape Shifter Curse mod it contains.

### About the mod version in the modpack

Since the original mod uses some logic that conflicts with Sinytra Connector, the Shape Shifter Curse mod used in this modpack is a [compatible version](https://github.com/xu233333/shape-shifter-curse-fabric/actions) maintained by [@xu233333](https://github.com/xu233333).

**Please note:** This integration package is only a temporary solution during the mod development process. Due to the complexity of the adaptation, updates to this version may be delayed compared to the official release. Additionally, compatibility with other Forge mods together with using Sinytra Connector cannot be guaranteed due to high instability factors.

For a stable experience, please wait for the official Forge version of the mod to be released.

### Additional mods included

To ensure compatibility between the Shape Shifter Curse mod and Sinytra Connector, this modpack includes the following open-source mods hosted outside of Modrinth:

- Additional Apoli Lib:

  [Apoli 2.9.2](https://github.com/apace100/apoli/releases/tag/2.9.2%2Bmc.1.20.1): Apoli lib is needed to implement the various forms' powers in the mod. Under normal circumstances, Apoli are embedded within the mod and do not need to be downloaded separately. However, including the additional Apoli lib in this modpack has proven necessary for compatibility with Sinytra Connector.

### Acknowledgments

The initial compatibility between the Shape Shifter Curse mod and Sinytra Connector was made possible thanks to the research efforts of [@donmor](https://github.com/donmor) and the dedicated work of [@xu233333](https://github.com/xu233333). 

You can find the related discussion issues [here](https://github.com/onixary/shape-shifter-curse-fabric/issues/200).

---
# 幻形者诅咒 信雅互联兼容整合包

## 简介

这一整合包是Shape Shifter Curse模组适配于信雅互联mod的开箱即用的整合包。它让在Forge端游玩模组成为可能

其中只包含Shape Shifter Curse模组所需的前置，以及少量不影响玩法的Qol模组。在安装之后，你可以在其中自由添加喜好的模组

整合包的版本号与其中Shape Shifter Curse模组的版本号保持一致

### Mod版本说明

由于原版模组中使用了一些与信雅互联有冲突的逻辑，这一整合包使用的Shape Shifter Curse模组是由 [@xu233333](https://github.com/xu233333) 额外维护的[兼容版本](https://github.com/xu233333/shape-shifter-curse-fabric/actions)

**请注意**：这一整合包只是模组开发过程中的权宜之计。由于适配难度，这一版本的更新可能延后于正式版本。另外，与使用了信雅互联的其他Forge端模组的兼容性由于不稳定性因素过大，也无法包含在开发计划中

要获取稳定的体验，请耐心等待正式Forge版本模组的开发

### 额外包说明

为了让Shape Shifter Curse模组与信雅互联兼容，这一整合包中包含一些托管于Modrinth之外的开源模组：

- 额外的Apoli库：

  [Apoli 2.9.2](https://github.com/apace100/apoli/releases/tag/2.9.2%2Bmc.1.20.1)：用于实现各形态的能力。在通常情形下，Apoli库内嵌于模组中，不需要额外下载。但是为了让模组与信雅互联兼容，在整合包中包含额外的Apoli库已经被证明是必要的

### 鸣谢

得益于 [@donmor](https://github.com/donmor)的探索，以及[@xu233333](https://github.com/xu233333)的努力，这一模组才实现了与信雅互联的初步兼容

你可以在[这里](https://github.com/onixary/shape-shifter-curse-fabric/issues/200)找到讨论Issue
